executives.name: Beth Whited
executives.background: Beth Whited is the President of Union Pacific. She has served in numerous executive roles including Executive Vice President - Sustainability and Strategy, and Chief Human Resources Officer.

tenure_dates.title: Member of the Board of Directors

executives.name: Julie Lagacy
executives.background: Ms. Lagacy previously served as Chief Sustainability and Strategy Officer at Caterpillar Inc. She joined the board in 2023.
